线上完牌按大小,有导师带的那种【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238581199_61444649<br>vk.com/topic-238580520_61764837<br>vk.com/topic-238541588_61144759<br>vk.com/topic-238126536_61009531<br>vk.com/topic-238581400_61764836<br>vk.com/topic-238530773_60913486<br>vk.com/topic-238580055_60563113<br>vk.com/topic-238529743_60913487<br>vk.com/topic-238100043_60913513<br>vk.com/topic-238394666_61009537<br>vk.com/topic-238581368_61144786<br>vk.com/topic-238507320_61764880<br>vk.com/topic-238539367_62103723<br>vk.com/topic-238581212_61257376<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60672620<br>vk.com/topic-238126734_60672645<br>vk.com/topic-238539304_60672626<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61764920<br>vk.com/topic-237864365_60563172<br>vk.com/topic-237864457_62103743<br>vk.com/topic-238530233_60913512<br>vk.com/topic-238343946_61009594<br>vk.com/topic-237864373_60913558<br>vk.com/topic-238570085_60563225<br>vk.com/topic-238581034_60672687<br>vk.com/topic-238163198_61144855<br>vk.com/topic-238163252_61257432<br>vk.com/topic-238539362_61257424<br>vk.com/topic-238163212_61257413<br>vk.com/topic-238581192_61257403<br>vk.com/topic-238163206_61009621<br>vk.com/topic-238265037_62103800<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60913582<br>vk.c
